statement: In every magma, Equation 1348 (`x = y * (((y * z) * w) * u)`) implies Equation 229 (`x = (y * (y * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0181
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op y z) w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op y x)) y)
